prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次分别为15460→15567→15879→12093→12501名，2024年出现明显前移（从15879跃升至12093），2025年小幅后移至12501名，近两年位次 整体在12000–12500区间波动，2025年基准约12501名；该校在内蒙古自治区理科组招生计划2021–2025年均为20人，2026年计划仍为20人，连续六年计划 持平，无扩招或缩招信号。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 广西大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第94位→2022年第99位→2023年第96位→2024年第90位→202 5年第89位→2026年第86位，排名稳步提升，学校综合实力和认可度逐年增强；近年声誉舆情平稳，未见明显负面事件或投档异常记录；抖音热度总排名第25位（ 较热），视频15条，综合热度约183万，在211高校中关注度处于中等偏上水平，对报考热度有温和正向作用；第五轮学科评估中广西大学未收录A-及以上学科数 据，优势学科信息缺失。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在内蒙古招生专业以电气工程及其自动化、机械电子工程、电子科学与技术、通信工程、土木工程为主，其中 电气工程及其自动化2024年社会热度为高热推荐，电子信息/通信类为高热推荐，土木工程为分化观望；本省2026年普通高考总人数约154000人，按2025年物理类占比约72%估算， 物理类考生约110880人，较2025年物理类83716人增长约32.5%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；广西大学位于广西南 宁市，距内蒙古较远，属于跨省就读。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划连续六年持平、学校软科排名持续上升、抖音热 度中等偏上、本省物理类考生大幅增加约32.5%等因素，2026年报考竞争预计较2025年有所加剧，位次将小幅后移；预测最低位次约12701名，区间12201–13201名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间12201–13201名内，建议以二档专业（机械电子工程、电子科学与技术）为主攻方向，一档专业（电气工程及其自动化、通信工程）作为冲刺，三档专业（土木工 程）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（12201名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程及其自动化等热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were 15460 → 15567 → 15879 → 12093 → 12501 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant forward shift (from 15879 to 12093), and in 2025, it slightly moved back to 12501. In the past two years, rankings have fluctuated within the 12000–12500 range, with a baseline of approximately 12501 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region has been 20 students from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan remains 20 students, with no expansion or contraction signals for six consecutive years.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Guangxi University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising: 94th in 2021 → 99th in 2022 → 96th in 2023 → 90th in 2024 → 89th in 2025 → 86th in 2026, indicating a continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In recent years, the reputation has been stable, with no significant negative events or abnormal filing records. On Douyin, it ranks 25th in overall popularity (relatively hot), with 15 videos and a comprehensive popularity of about 1.83 million, placing it at an upper-middle level of attention among 211 universities, which has a moderately positive effect on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Guangxi University did not include data on A- or above disciplines, so information on advantageous disciplines is lacking.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's enrollment majors in Inner Mongolia mainly include Electrical Engineering and Automation, Mechatronic Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology, Communication Engineering, and Civil Engineering. Among them, Electrical Engineering and Automation had a high social popularity in 2024, Electronics/Communication majors were highly recommended, and Civil Engineering was in a differentiated wait-and-see state. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in the province is about 154,000. Based on the estimated 72% proportion of physics category students in 2025, there are about 110,880 physics category students, an increase of about 32.5% compared to 83,716 in 2025, indicating a significant increase in the number of candidates and intensified competition. Guangxi University is located in Nanning, Guangxi, which is far from Inner Mongolia, making it an inter-provincial study destination.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the enrollment plan being stable for six consecutive years, the university's Soft Science ranking continuously rising, Douyin popularity being above average, and a significant increase of about 32.5% in physics category candidates in the province, the competition for admission in 2026 is expected to be more intense than in 2025, with rankings slightly moving back. The predicted minimum ranking is about 12,701, with a range of 12,201–13,201.

- Communication Engineering.

- Electronic Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 12,201–13,201, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechatronic Engineering, Electronic Science and Technology) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Electrical Engineering and Automation, Communication Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering) as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 12,201), one can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation.
